title: An Act providing an appropriation for the operation of the Judicial Branch of the Government of the Virgin Islands, the Judicial Council, and the Office
text:
ACTNO.8 894
BILL NO. 35-0346
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation for the operation ofthe Judicial Branch ofthe Government
of the Virgin Islands, the Judicial Council, and the Office of the Territorial Public Defender
during the fiscal year October 1,2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The following sums are appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands for operating expenses in the fiscal year
starting October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025, to the following entities:
0100 GENERAL FUND F’Y 2025
JUDICIAL COUNCIL S 130.620
VIRGIN ISLANDS JUDICIARY AND COURT SYSTEM S 41,080.000
OFFICE OF THE TERRITORIAL PUBLIC DEFENDER $ 6,132,220
TOTAL 0100 GENERAL FUND S 47,342,840
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 36%ay of
September, AD., 2024.
flJL
Novelle E. Francis, Jr.
President
Secretary

AAA
A
Bill No. 35- 0346 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal of the Government of
the United States Virjslands at Charlotte Amalie,
St Thomas, This I’t day ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
